patterns.description: Wrong implementation failures: 2 occurrence(s) across issues ['PR#5-regression']
patterns.reason: A correct test failed due to a code error. The coding-agent should have caught this before handing off.
patterns.suggested_prompt_addition: Before claiming done, re-run all contract tests and confirm each one passes with a real behavioral assertion, not just exit code 0.

workflow_patterns.description: Required skill skipped failures: 8 occurrence(s) across issues ['1,2,3,4', 'Multi-issue parallel-branch run for drumrot: #59 MIDIKit/SwiftMIDI adoption + #58 MIDI diagnostic overlay + #60 External audio mode toggle, landed on both main (iOS 17+/SwiftData) and release/ios16-only (iOS 16.6+/UserDefaults), then TestFlight build 3 uploaded (delivery UUID ee1452f2-ab9a-4848-81ea-ba3289a7a0c5).', 'SP-808 chassis UI-parity: all non-Play tabs + SPLidBar (workflow/run-2026-05-27)']
affected_issues: Multi-issue parallel-branch run for drumrot: #59 MIDIKit/SwiftMIDI adoption + #58 MIDI diagnostic overlay + #60 External audio mode toggle, landed on both main (iOS 17+/SwiftData) and release/ios16-only (iOS 16.6+/UserDefaults), then TestFlight build 3 uploaded (delivery UUID ee1452f2-ab9a-4848-81ea-ba3289a7a0c5).
SP-808 chassis UI-parity: all non-Play tabs + SPLidBar (workflow/run-2026-05-27)
workflow_patterns.reason: A required skill in the canonical chain was skipped. The orchestrator must enforce the chain — every required step is gated.
workflow_patterns.suggested_prompt_addition: Before dispatching the next step, verify that the immediately-previous required step in the chain announced itself, expanded its TodoWrite checklist, and emitted its expected output artifact. If the previous step is missing, halt and surface the gap rather than continuing.

workflow_patterns.description: Bypassed orchestrator routing failures: 1 occurrence(s) across issues ['1,2,3,4']
workflow_patterns.reason: Agent bypassed the orchestrator and went straight to implementation despite the repo having AGENTS.md and docs/ai/*.
workflow_patterns.suggested_prompt_addition: Add a Pre-Flight Check that runs FIRST on every entry: if AGENTS.md and docs/ai/project-state.md both exist, the orchestrator must be the entry point — no Edit/Write/Bash on source code is permitted until orchestrator dispatch has emitted a routing decision. Reject any direct-implementation attempt with a one-line redirect to orchestrator.

workflow_patterns.description: Wrong-repo/branch operation failures: 1 occurrence(s) across issues ['Multi-issue parallel-branch run for drumrot: #59 MIDIKit/SwiftMIDI adoption + #58 MIDI diagnostic overlay + #60 External audio mode toggle, landed on both main (iOS 17+/SwiftData) and release/ios16-only (iOS 16.6+/UserDefaults), then TestFlight build 3 uploaded (delivery UUID ee1452f2-ab9a-4848-81ea-ba3289a7a0c5).']
affected_issues: Multi-issue parallel-branch run for drumrot: #59 MIDIKit/SwiftMIDI adoption + #58 MIDI diagnostic overlay + #60 External audio mode toggle, landed on both main (iOS 17+/SwiftData) and release/ios16-only (iOS 16.6+/UserDefaults), then TestFlight build 3 uploaded (delivery UUID ee1452f2-ab9a-4848-81ea-ba3289a7a0c5).
workflow_patterns.reason: Skill targeted agent-stack but commits/PRs went to target project (or vice versa), or branch was not confirmed before a visible operation.
workflow_patterns.suggested_prompt_addition: Add a Repo+Branch Confirmation gate: every skill that performs git push, gh pr create, browser smoke against a deployed URL, or any operation visible outside the local checkout must first emit `git -C <path> remote get-url origin` and `git -C <path> rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD`, compare against the skill's intended target, and halt on mismatch.

workflow_patterns.description: Premature completion claim failures: 1 occurrence(s) across issues ['SP-808 chassis UI-parity: all non-Play tabs + SPLidBar (workflow/run-2026-05-27)']
affected_issues: SP-808 chassis UI-parity: all non-Play tabs + SPLidBar (workflow/run-2026-05-27)
workflow_patterns.reason: Agent claimed work done, fixed, passing, or opened a PR without verification-gate evidence captured in the transcript.
workflow_patterns.suggested_prompt_addition: Strengthen the Required Evidence section: completion claims (the words 'done', 'fixed', 'ready', 'passing', 'shipped', or opening a PR) are FORBIDDEN unless preceded in the SAME response by a captured tool-call output block showing the check command and its exit-zero/green result. Add this as a hard rule in the Red Flags table.

workflow_patterns.description: Sync step skipped after canonical edit failures: 1 occurrence(s) across issues ['workflow-retrospective (ui-parity run) pushed skill edits but never synced — W7 P0']
affected_issues: workflow-retrospective (ui-parity run) pushed skill edits but never synced — W7 P0
workflow_patterns.reason: Canonical skills were edited but ai-workflow sync-globals was not run, so install targets stayed stale.
workflow_patterns.suggested_prompt_addition: After every commit to claude/skills/ or codex/skills/ in agent-stack, the immediate next command MUST be `ai-workflow sync-globals`. Add this as a non-skippable step at the end of the Completion Checklist of workflow-retrospective and prompt-evolver (post-merge). Make the failure mode of 'edited but did not sync' a P0 in the checklist.
